report.summary: Community growth cycle Mar 17: FOMC T-2 day content push — full week social calendar (Tue-Sun) drafted around FOMC countdown, 8 crypto card reviews, Hyperliquid trading guide, and Telegram bots guide; FOMC-day newsletter special drafted with 3 subject lines; social card created (FOMC + crypto cards dual-panel); 388 pages live with only 2 remaining in queue; weekend posts from v15 carry forward.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (Tue Mar 17): FOMC countdown — 'The Fed decides on rates in 48 hours' with dovish/hawkish scenarios; CTA to /learn/fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide
Tweet (Tue Mar 17): Crypto card reviews launch — 8 cards side-by-side comparison with key feature per card; CTA to /crypto-cards
Discord/Telegram (Tue Mar 17): FOMC week prep announcement — guide link + Hyperliquid trading guide for perps traders
Tweet (Tue Mar 17): Hyperliquid trading guide — $25B+ daily perps volume, on-chain order book, HLP vault mechanics; CTA to /learn/hyperliquid-trading-guide
Tweet (Tue Mar 17): Telegram trading bots guide — $50B+ volume, snipers, copy-trade, multi-chain, security; CTA to /learn/telegram-trading-bots-guide-2026
Tweet (Wed Mar 18): FOMC eve reminder — 'Markets pricing a hold. But the press conference is where the alpha is.'

Newsletter (Thu Mar 19): FOMC Day Special — market pulse, 5 new feature highlights (FOMC guide, 8 card reviews, Hyperliquid, Telegram bots, Virtuals Protocol), BTCFi + PayFi as worth reading, Sprint 59 poll in degen corner; 3 subject lines (A/B/C)
Tweet (Wed Mar 19): FOMC day live — rate decision + press conference times, historical scenario outcomes
Tweet (Fri Mar 20): Sprint 59 poll (corrected — options chain viewer replaces shipped exchange reviews); page count updated to 388+
Tweet (Fri Mar 20): Week in review — 388 pages, +54 this week, 8 card reviews, FOMC guide, queue nearly empty
Sat/Sun Mar 21-22: BTCFi thread, Kaito InfoFi tweet, Aave V4 DeFi Sunday — carry forward from v15 unchanged

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-fomc-crypto-cards-2026.svg — 1200x630 dual-panel social card: LEFT panel FOMC countdown (T-2, Wed Mar 19 2pm ET, dovish/hawkish scenario cards with BTC impact); RIGHT panel 8 crypto card reviews grid (Crypto.com, Coinbase, Bybit, Gemini, Nexo, Fold, BitPay, Binance with cashback/feature tags); bottom bar (388+ pages, 54 new this week); glass-morphism + brand gradient. Saved to /public/social-fomc-crypto-cards-2026.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: 388 published pages — up from 334 at last community report (+54 in ~24h). Massive publish acceleration Day 33-51.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: Only 2 items remaining (Bitcoin Runes + Farcaster SocialFi). Near-zero backlog.
FOMC guide published today at T-2 — optimal indexing timing before Wed rate decision. Highest-urgency SEO page this week.
Crypto cards vertical: 8 reviews now live covering top commercial-intent keywords. Each is an affiliate revenue page.
GSC organic signals: Day 17 of 14-21 window. First organic clicks likely arriving. 54 new pages entering index means imminent impressions jump.
FOMC catalyst T-2 (Wed Mar 19). Full social calendar Tue-Sun with FOMC as central narrative. Newsletter timed for FOMC day.
